name: FallRiskAssessmentIG
title: Fall Risk Assessment Implementation Guide
description: Interoperable FHIR-based fall risk assessment for older adults using standardized scoring, objective performance tests, and EHR-derived data.

resource.name: Example Patient – Maria Müller
resource.description: A 78-year-old female patient undergoing fall risk assessment.

resource.name: Example Practitioner
resource.description: The physiotherapist conducting the fall risk assessment.

resource.name: Example – Condition: At Risk of Falls
resource.description: Problem list entry created after moderate fall risk assessment.

resource.name: Example – Fall Risk Score (18/30)
resource.description: Aggregated fall risk score of 18 out of 30 — Moderate risk.

resource.name: Example – Falls History QuestionnaireResponse
resource.description: Patient reports 2 falls in the past 12 months.

resource.name: Example – Fear of Falling (Factor 2)
resource.description: Patient reports 55% confidence on the ABC Scale.

resource.name: Example – Timed Up and Go Test
resource.description: Patient completed TUG in 14.2 seconds (elevated risk threshold >12 s).

resource.name: Fall Risk Category ValueSet
resource.description: Risk classification outcomes for fall risk assessment using SNOMED qualifier values.

resource.name: Fall Risk Factor Observation
resource.description:
A standardized FHIR Observation representing a single contributing factor
to fall risk (e.g., fear of falling, walking ability, alcohol use).

Both auto-populated EHR data and manually entered questionnaire answers
are ultimately stored in this format, ensuring a uniform interface for
the scoring algorithm.

resource.name: Fall Risk Factors ValueSet
resource.description: Standardized LOINC and SNOMED codes for fall risk assessment inputs. Display names use the official terminology display text.

resource.name: Fall Risk Local Code System
resource.description: Local codes for physical performance tests and aggregate scores not yet available in the licensed LOINC version.

resource.name: Fall Risk Observation
resource.description:
The outcome of a fall risk screening episode, capturing the overall
risk classification (Low / Moderate / High) and referencing the
aggregated score Observation.

resource.name: Fall Risk Performance Test Observation
resource.description:
Objective physical performance measurements used in fall risk assessment:
30-Second Chair Stand Test, 4-Stage Balance Test, and Timed Up & Go (TUG).

TUG uses LOINC 30945-0 (validated). Chair Stand and Balance Test use local
codes because the commonly cited LOINC codes 82755-5 and 92631-9 are not
present in the currently licensed LOINC 2.82 release.

resource.name: Fall Risk Performance Tests ValueSet
resource.description: Codes for objective physical performance tests. TUG uses validated LOINC; Chair Stand and Balance Test use local codes.

resource.name: Fall Risk Score Observation
resource.description:
The aggregated fall risk score (0–30) computed from all individual
Fall Risk Factor Observations. hasMember links back to every
contributing factor so the chain of evidence is traceable.
